title: name colors
description: A simple server-side mod that adds a command for changing your name color in chat
body:
# Name Colors
A simple server-side mod that adds a command for changing your name color in chat

With the mod installed on the server, players may run `/color <hex_code>` (e.g. `/color ffff8d`) to change their color (the hex value may optionally be prefixed with `#`), and `/color clear` to reset their color back to the default.  

All users with a color set will have their name appear in their color whenever they type in the chat
